personal.preferred_title: Senior Product Solutions Architect | Observability & Reliability

summary: Senior technology professional with 20+ years of experience across observability, reliability engineering, and enterprise architecture guidance. Proven record of helping customers and internal teams design production-ready monitoring architectures, optimize telemetry pipelines, and resolve complex operational issues. Strong hands-on foundation in cloud infrastructure, monitoring platforms, and developer-facing tooling with a customer-first consultative approach.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and operated telemetry pipelines for 6,000+ endpoints, enabling scalable monitoring insights and proactive reliability planning.
Provided architecture and operational guidance to engineering teams on data collection, alerting, and observability-driven decision making.
Designed production-focused dashboards and reporting workflows that improved triage speed and reduced operational ambiguity.
Partnered with stakeholders across infrastructure and applications to standardize measurable service practices and improve uptime outcomes.

experience.title: Performance Engineer (Dynatrace)
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and synthetic monitoring for customer-facing systems in production.
Delivered architecture-level recommendations for performance optimization and improved end-to-end visibility.
Supported cloud migration initiatives while maintaining observability coverage and operational reliability.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (APM SME)
bullets: Advised enterprise teams on APM architecture and implementation strategy across large, complex environments.
Built reusable dashboards, alerting modules, and operational playbooks to improve consistency and adoption.
Worked with customer teams in high-pressure troubleshooting scenarios to identify root causes and implement durable fixes.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed production-like workloads and system behavior to guide stability and performance improvements.
Documented actionable monitoring and tuning recommendations for engineering teams.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Contributed to high-scale migration and architecture initiatives with emphasis on reliability and operational readiness.
Created validation workflows to support resilient rollout in complex distributed environments.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Enterprise Telemetry and Reliability Framework
projects.description: Developed monitoring data pipelines and operational reporting frameworks used to improve service reliability and reduce incident resolution time.

projects.name: Dynatrace Production Monitoring Program
projects.description: Designed and supported end-to-end monitoring patterns and synthetic coverage for customer-facing systems, improving visibility and operational response.
